ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "fullname" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "phone_no" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "linkedin_link" TEXT /* LinkedIn profile link of the user */,
  "social_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier from social media (e.g., LinkedIn ID) */,
  "social_type" INTEGER /* Type of social media (1 - LinkedIn) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief description or biography of the user */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to other social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the device */,
  "device_token" TEXT /* Token used for push notifications */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (Android/IOS) */,
  "lat" TEXT /* Latitude of the device location */,
  "lang" TEXT /* Longitude of the device location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the device was registered */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the device information was last updated */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version of the device */,
  "app_version" TEXT /* Version of the app installed on the device */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date and time the device was last used */,
  "is_registered" INTEGER /* Indicates if the device is registered with the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interests" (
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest */,
  "interest_name" TEXT /* Name of the interest */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interest */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the interest was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the interest was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the interest */,
  "is_popular" INTEGER /* Indicates if the interest is popular among users */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the popularity of the interest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interests" (
  "user_interest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user interest */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interest */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user interest was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user interest was last updated */,
  "score" INTEGER /* User's interest level in a particular interest */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the interest (e.g., user input, system recommendation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_interest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interests_interest_id FOREIGN KEY ("interest_id") REFERENCES interests ("interest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_endpoints" (
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API endpoint */,
  "api_name" TEXT /* Name of the API endpoint */,
  "api_url" TEXT /* URL of the API endpoint */,
  "method" TEXT /* HTTP method (GET, POST, etc.) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the API endpoint */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the API endpoint was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the API endpoint was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the API endpoint is active */,
  "rate_limit" INTEGER /* Rate limit for the API endpoint (e.g., requests per minute) */,
  "authentication_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if authentication is required to access the endpoint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the API call */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API endpoint accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time the API was accessed */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the API response */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time in milliseconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was last updated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user making the API call */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user making the API call */,
  "request_body" TEXT /* Request body of the API call */,
  "response_body" TEXT /* Response body of the API call */,
  "request_method" TEXT /* HTTP method used for the API call (e.g., GET, POST) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is a default role */,
  "is_system" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is a system role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user role was last updated */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is the primary role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is a default permission */,
  "is_system" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is a system permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role permission was last updated */,
  "is_granted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is granted to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)
